Not sure which type or size of gold pan is right for you? Watch to find out! And, if you still have questions after the video, leave us a comment and we'll get back to you! The gold pans included in this four-piece combo set feature four separate gold panning zones, a compact micro riffle, a flat sidewall, a deep 3.25-inch riffle area and 1/8 inch deep round base. The versatile riffles and complementary zones work together to optimize gold recovery, increasing surface area for faster and more efficient sifting and sorting of any potential gold nuggets or gold flakes.

title: How to Use ASR Outdoor Mini 6 Inch Classifier Screens for Gold Panning
description:
SHOP: https://asroutdoor.com/collections/sifters-or-classifiers

Necessary for sifting unclassified paydirt, these 6" classifier screens are a must have to include with your gold prospecting equipment. Utilizing our high-impact classifier screen sieves is one of the first steps in successful gold prospecting by reducing down your material into a manageable size. The Gold Rush Prospectors Mini Classifier Sifting Screen Set will aid in your recovery efforts by sorting your raw material quickly and efficiently. Although gold is heavy, small flakes will not be able to displace larger rocks from your initial sample. Screening or classifying material into groups based on size will ensure that any gold, whether nuggets or flakes, will not get lost.

We’re excited to introduce our latest and most exciting product: The Break Your Own Geodes Kit! This fantastic kit is perfect for family fun and making unforgettable memories with friends. Dive into the adventure of breaking open real geodes and uncover the stunning crystals hidden inside. 

Our Geode Kit includes: 1 10 inch Sledge Hammer, 1 pair of Adjustable Safety Goggles, a Geode Information Card, and a Burlap Bag of 10 Geodes. The geodes come in two different sizes; 4 Medium (3-5 inches) and 6 small (2-3 inches).

In this video, we’ll show you everything that comes with the kit, how to use it safely, and the incredible gems you might discover. This hands-on activity  not only exhibits education learning in kid sciences but also a blast for all ages! Whether you're hosting a family game night, planning a kids' party, or just looking for a unique weekend project, our Geodes Kit has got you covered.

Join us as we demonstrate the kit in action and share tips for making the most of your geode breaking experience. Geodes for Kids and all Ages. Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and hit the bell icon to stay updated with our latest products and exciting content!

🔹 Why You’ll Love This Kit:

- Perfect for family bonding and fun with friends
- Hands-on science activity that’s both educational and entertaining
- Discover beautiful, natural crystals inside each geode
- Ideal for birthday parties, school projects, and weekend activities

✨ Get yours today and start your geode adventure!
